Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Set For Trial On Jan-17-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Ty Lin International To Provide Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Nathan Kingery
Off Calendar Jan-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Nathan Kingery, Esq. (213.381.9988; nkingery@wilshirelawfirm.com) of Wilshire Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Laura Tovar, Esq. (415.433.1940; ltovar@littler.com) of Littler Mendelson P.C. for Defendants.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BRIAN ROBERTS' Motion To Compel Defendant T.Y. Lin International To Provide Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents: is taken under submission.

The court to issue an order.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
